headings.usage: Use Outfit for all Main and Sub-headings. Do not use Inter or generic sans.

body.usage: Use for all body text, tables, and standard UI elements.

mono.usage: Use for Terraform/CLI scripts, AWS ARNs, and JSON.

glass_header_sidebar.usage: Use strictly for the top sticky navigation, floating sidebars, toasts, and modal overlays.

dashboard_card.usage: Use for all main dashboard widgets (charts, tables, metrics) to maintain hierarchy and prevent glassmorphism overload.

code_block.classes: bg-black/80 border border-zinc-800 rounded-lg p-4 font-mono text-zinc-300

grid.usage: Control Room Grid layout. Every pixel must be utilized.

motion.hover: Explicit hover states on all interactive elements (e.g., hover:text-white hover:bg-zinc-800)

components.badges: For severities: use solid dark backgrounds with vibrant 1px borders and text. e.g., bg-red-950/50 text-red-500 border-red-500/30.
components.buttons: Primary buttons: bg-blue-600 text-white hover:bg-blue-500. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-zinc-700 hover:bg-zinc-800.
components.tables: Go cardless or rectangular. Dense styling for data-heavy FinOps views.
components.charts: Use Recharts or Shadcn Charts. Vibrant neon lines over dark minimal grids.

image_urls.description: Abstract blurry dark gradient (orange/blue). Use as a full-page background for the Login/Auth page.
Abstract streaks of light. Can be used as a subtle texture overlay on empty states or hero.
Moody B&W portrait of a man in glasses. Use as the active user's profile avatar.
Portrait of a bald man in a black suit. Use as an alternative team member avatar in approval workflows.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install fonts: Outfit (Headings), IBM Plex Sans (Body), JetBrains Mono (Code).
Implement a dark theme base (bg-zinc-950) globally.
Use Crystal Glassmorphism ONLY for the Sidebar, Header, Modals, and Toasts. Do not overuse glass on standard dashboard cards.
Use 'dashboard_card' styles (flat dark background, 1px border) for metrics, charts, and table wrappers.
Build the dashboard using the 'Control Room' grid approach. Eliminate jagged bottoms by ensuring all cards have h-full.
Data heavy views (Resource Inventory, Cost Explorer) must be dense and easily scannable.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, navigation links, and major interactive widgets.
Ensure hover states explicitly define color changes (e.g., hover:text-white).
Do NOT use purple or teal green/blue anywhere in the UI.
The login page should feature the provided abstract blurry gradient background image, overlaid with a glassmorphic login card.
